blocks.content: He smiled. I didn't like that smile.

blocks.speaker: Daniel
blocks.content: Aight, Larry. I'll figure it out.
He bumped my shoulder going past. Deliberate. Just enough.
Jonathan was at the end of the hall. He'd seen it. He waited until I got close.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Nah what was that tho fr?

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Bruh stepped to you for real.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Now he got a reason to run up on you. You know who that is? That's Daniel Snyder.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: I wasn't just gonna stand there.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Sometimes you just gotta stand there tho, real talk. First day, first impressions — that stuff sticks no cap.
